Autotrader.note: Blocked/unavailable to automated browser. Page title was 'Autotrader - page unavailable' with message: 'We're sorry for any inconvenience, but the site is currently unavailable.' No usable listings were observed directly from Autotrader.

Cars.com.note: Blocked by Cloudflare to automated browser. Page title was 'Attention Required! | Cloudflare' with message: 'Sorry, you have been blocked.' Cars.com listings were not directly accessible, though some Cars.com-linked records appeared inside AutoTempest results.

AutoTempest.note: Accessible. AutoTempest returned 95+ results for zip 23462, radius 50, max price $10,000, max mileage 150,000. Captured verified listings where title, URL, price, mileage, and location were visible. AutoTempest also exposed Cars.com, eBay, TrueCar, and other source links.

Craigslist Hampton Roads.note: Accessible. Craigslist Hampton Roads cars+trucks search showed 306 max-$10,000 results in/near Virginia Beach. Captured preferred Toyota/Honda/small-pickup listings with visible price and mileage under 150,000; left higher-mileage Toyota/Honda leads out of SQLite.

eBay Motors.note: Direct eBay Motors query returned an eBay error page in the browser, but eBay Motors listings were visible through AutoTempest and are captured when sufficiently verified. Treat direct eBay as partially blocked/unusable for this run.

Other web/local dealer search.note: CarGurus direct search hit a DataDome device check; TrueCar direct search hit a human verification challenge. DuckDuckGo web-indexed queries returned an anomaly/captcha page, so no snippet-only web leads were usable. TrueCar-linked records were observed through AutoTempest only.
Other web/local dealer search.attempted_url: DuckDuckGo queries from sources.md; CarGurus direct search; TrueCar direct search
